title: helia tetragona
intro: Helia tetragona, also known as the Heliotrope, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Helia tetragona include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Helia tetragona can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
